title: Sorted columns are not carried over same way from main board to dashboard
excerpt: Sorted and saved columns are not appearing in the same way as in the main board to dashboard. The column order is random and not even the same as main board even when it’s not sorted. Support desk concluded that it needs…

posts.author: jagank (jagank)
posts.cookedHtml: Sorted and saved columns are not appearing in the same way as in the main board to dashboard. The column order is random and not even the same as main board even when it’s not sorted. Support desk concluded that it needs dev team to look at it.
